programme.desc: Contestants try to knock out their opponents and clinch a spot in the final round for a chance to win $10,000.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With Rachel's Big Kiss
programme.desc: A college friend with whom Rachel shared an embarrassing and passionate moment shows up at Central Perk; Chandler and Ross argue for possession of Val Kilmer's tuxedo; Joey drives Monica crazy over the wedding schedule.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Lesbian Wedding
programme.desc: Ross helps put Carol and Susan's wedding plans back on track; Rachel's mother announces shocking new plans.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon chooses to participate in a guys-only weekend Star Wars gaming marathon rather than go with Amy to her aunt's birthday party; he gets a lesson from Penny and Amy.

programme.title: The Conners

programme.desc: A son and daughter denounce their murderous father; a drunken driver breaks down in court; a misbehaving spectator feels the judge's wrath.

programme.sub-title: The One After the Super Bowl
